metadata.description: ROSCODE TECH plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-capturing-website-media
plugins.description: Given a URL, capture full-page PNGs, per-page scroll-animation WEBM clips, and an optional full-site tour video. Playwright + headless Chromium, depth-controlled (landing page only, or auto-discovered main nav pages), no auth.
